race.comment: Tough race with a host of win chances. Many of these struggle to win though so leaning to JEDD'S JET (5) who perhaps has the most upside. Off the mark with a strong win second-up and looks ideally suited by the mile now. Worth following up. PURR SEFANEE (12)  has missed the frame at each run this time in but in each case has been on the winners heels. This suits and gets chance. SIR JAG (2) is racing in great form winning two of last three. Can measure up again. COASTAL STRIKE (6) battled on well to hold second behind SIR JAG and will strip much fitter. Could well turn the tables. CARNELIAN ROCK (11) is going better than it looks and will be running on hard.
